{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260320172248A0EAC87C7A747EF928E5"}"},"total":987},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7598052382984241944","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"这本小说的结构非常紧凑，每一章节都如同精心雕琢的积木，严丝合缝地搭建起整个故事的框架。开篇便以悬念切入，迅速抓住读者眼球；中间情节层层递进，环环相扣；结尾收束有力，既出人意料又在情理之中。作者巧妙运用倒叙、插叙等手法，使时间线错落有致却不显凌乱。主线与支线交织并行，既丰富了故事层次，又始终保持着清晰的叙事脉络。每个场景的转换都自然流畅，如同电影镜头般精准到位。这种严谨而不失灵活的结构设计，让读者既能享受阅读的快感，又能体会到作者高超的叙事技巧。"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1769063325,"group_id":"7471835222967864345","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"主打一个酱油，专业跑龙套","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N6CRf7pj51KRt+xgrmxc6CE=","gender":2,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/4804dfa593814a309b62691468abdef2~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776537898&x-signature=mQsqyGkmU%2BnwzvL%2BODsZtzge7zE%3D","user_id":"494138181552208","user_name":"社保刀圣楚明"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"494138181552208","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7471835222967864345","book_info":{"abstract":"南北朝（420 年—589 年 ）这段时期，政权更迭频繁，英雄人物辈出，金戈铁马，逐鹿中原，各种阴谋阳谋奇谋，兵法战策层出不穷，很好看！
但这一时期也是民族大融合的时期，北方民族在战乱中逐渐与汉族融合。


总之，南北朝是中国历史上一个充满变革和多元发展的时期。家能够喜欢，你们的关注是我写作的动力，我会努力讲好每个故事！","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/p2o4a3ab2b1f79ddf6f573abb0f27f036f9~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"兜里装着历史","author_id":"","book_id":"7471835222967864345","book_name":"不大正经的南北朝","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#203820","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"3427人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":273,"name":"历史古代","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=273&name=历史古代&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":497,"name":"武将","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=497&name=武将&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":520,"name":"大佬","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=520&name=大佬&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":384,"name":"无敌","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=384&name=无敌&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7471839074404287001","read_count":"3427","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"1074991"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"9.4","serial_count":"461","tags":"历史古代,武将,大佬,无敌","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic-r/9c0a4f1b7d1d7a05d43bbc892ac22c44~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779182569&x-signature=uIidAqrI3or5ITzFU6Kg7vsUqTI%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"1185686245881322","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"720"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260320172248A0EAC87C7A747EF928E5"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读112小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":13,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":206283,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":401444,"reply_count":1,"show_pv":172},"user_action":{"author":0,"author_digg_time":1769158121,"author_reply_time":1769158182,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7597205770025550616","common":{"comment_type":21,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"这小说以严谨的史料为根基，以精妙的叙事为桥梁，打破了历史与通俗的壁垒，让南北朝这段被遮蔽的 “变革时代” 重新进入大众视野。它不仅是一部兼具可读性与知识性的历史小说，更是一次对历史叙事可能性的成功探索 —— 当 “笑谈” 的姿态遇上 “正经” 的历史，便成就了一部既能让读者读懂历史，又能让读者爱上历史的佳作。","text_exts":[{"e":39,"s":36,"text":"南北朝","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E5%8D%97%E5%8C%97%E6%9C%9D&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%2317739985697EF928E5%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227597205770025550616%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227471835222967864345%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E5%8D%97%E5%8C%97%E6%9C%9D%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"},{"e":82,"s":78,"text":"历史小说","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E5%8E%86%E5%8F%B2%E5%B0%8F%E8%AF%B4&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%2317739985697EF928E5%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227597205770025550616%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227471835222967864345%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E5%8E%86%E5%8F%B2%E5%B0%8F%E8%AF%B4%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1768913055,"group_id":"7471835222967864345","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"我的书在心里","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2NwDpUBWNrdCKE8hetJ3JTz0=","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/3eb6acbabcbd44e480fbcea2a5961222~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776529332&x-signature=rKJ0Uv69nKihIebkzSP2NPqbqOo%3D","user_id":"590859753234938","user_name":"守夜人雪花万"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"590859753234938","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7471835222967864345","book_info":{"abstract":"南北朝（420 年—589 年 ）这段时期，政权更迭频繁，英雄人物辈出，金戈铁马，逐鹿中原，各种阴谋阳谋奇谋，兵法战策层出不穷，很好看！
但这一时期也是民族大融合的时期，北方民族在战乱中逐渐与汉族融合。


总之，南北朝是中国历史上一个充满变革和多元发展的时期。家能够喜欢，你们的关注是我写作的动力，我会努力讲好每个故事！","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/p2o4a3ab2b1f79ddf6f573abb0f27f036f9~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"兜里装着历史","author_id":"","book_id":"7471835222967864345","book_name":"不大正经的南北朝","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#203820","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"3427人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":273,"name":"历史古代","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=273&name=历史古代&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":497,"name":"武将","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=497&name=武将&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":520,"name":"大佬","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=520&name=大佬&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":384,"name":"无敌","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=384&name=无敌&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7471839074404287001","read_count":"3427","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"1074991"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"9.4","serial_count":"461","tags":"历史古代,武将,大佬,无敌","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic-r/9c0a4f1b7d1d7a05d43bbc892ac22c44~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779182569&x-signature=uIidAqrI3or5ITzFU6Kg7vsUqTI%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"1185686245881322","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"707"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260320172248A0EAC87C7A747EF928E5"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读88小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":10,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":198029,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":317034,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":101},"user_action":{"author":0,"author_digg_time":1768919114,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7597918398549427006","common":{"comment_type":21,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"这部小说在历史知识的运用上堪称典范。作者对历史细节的把握精准到位，无论是典章制度、服饰器物还是社会风貌，都呈现出严谨的考据态度。文中对历史事件的还原既尊重史实，又巧妙融入虚构情节，使真实与想象浑然一体。人物对话中引用的典籍典故自然贴切，既符合时代特征，又推动情节发展。更难得的是，作者将复杂的历史背景转化为生动的叙事元素，让读者在享受故事的同时，不知不觉吸收了大量历史知识。这种寓教于乐的写作手法，既展现了作者深厚的历史功底，也体现了高超的文学造诣。"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1769041020,"group_id":"7471835222967864345","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"《苗疆守夜人》之蓝彩蝶","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2Nz3Ih9hfuDe78T4bVgsPbYSwBp0UfJTPZqM5w3S5hLxK","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/e6048a0888654d9ea337a5fa10f6ac0a~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776537682&x-signature=zc%2Bsn7madkU0iSJFf6DcYN89PnQ%3D","user_id":"1637644156539115","user_name":"落花守夜人蓝彩蝶"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"1637644156539115","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7471835222967864345","book_info":{"abstract":"南北朝（420
